message:
test(progress): add comprehensive unit tests for progress.ts module

Tests cover:
- createProgress factory function with all options
- ProgressReporter methods (update, complete, fail)
- TTY vs non-TTY behavior with spinner handling
- JSON vs text output formats
- Edge cases (negative values, NaN, overflow, truncation)
- Timer cleanup to prevent process hangs
- Throttling with minUpdateIntervalMs

33 tests, 100% pass rate, no mocks used.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
